title: Appendix #A-7 ORS Search Fields
body_text:
Appendix #A-7	ORS Search Fields
This table outlines the search fields that may be used to search for deposits, Chargebacks, adjustments and suspect duplicates.
Search Field
Description
Format
Instructions
From
Date items is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
ГўВЂВ“ Select the calendar icon to select date from calendar
ГўВЂВ“ Select date by selecting day of month in calendar
To
Date items is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Calendar icon
ГўВЂВ“ Select the calendar icon to select date from calendar
ГўВЂВ“ Select date by selecting day of month in calendar
Amount
Dollar amount of item
Text box
1ГўВЂВ“8 digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1-ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value and over
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњ-amnt1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific dollar value and under
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњamnt1-amnt2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of dollar values
Currency
Currency
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All
ГўВЂВ“ Other options are CAD (Canadian) and USD (US)
Type
Type of search
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Select Deposit or Cheque from the list
Transit
Transit
(Deposit Slip only)
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All in drop-down list
ГўВЂВ“ Select single financial institution transit to narrow down search
Trace #
Deposit Trace #
Text box, 1ГўВЂВ“10 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњtrc1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific trace #
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњtrc1-ГўВЂВќ to search for specific trace # and over
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњ-trc1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific trace # and under
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњtrc1-trc2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of trace #s
Trancode
Transaction code
(Deposit Slip only)
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All
ГўВЂВ“ Select specific code from list to search on that code only
Cheque Transit
Transit of cheque
(Cheque on Deposit only)
Text Box, 8 digits
Example: 12340002
Account
MICR account number on cheque
(Cheque on Deposit only)
Text Box, 1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњacct1ГўВЂВќ to search for a specific account
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњacct1-acct2ГўВЂВќ to search for a range of accounts
ГўВЂВ“ Use wildcard ГўВЂВњ%ГўВЂВќ to search by membership number (Example: %123456 to search for items with membership number 123456)
Cheque #
Cheque Serial #
(Cheque on Deposit only)
Text Box, 1ГўВЂВ“12 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњcheq1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific cheque #
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњcheq1-ГўВЂВќ to search for specific cheque # and over
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњ-cheq1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific cheque # and under
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњcheq1-cheq2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of cheque #s
Trace #
Item Trace #
Text box, 1ГўВЂВ“10 digits
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњtrc1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific trace #
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњtrc1-ГўВЂВќ to search for specific trace # and over
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњ-trc1ГўВЂВќ to search for specific trace # and under
ГўВЂВ“ Use ГўВЂВњtrc1-trc2ГўВЂВќ to search for range of trace #s
TranCode
Transaction code
(Cheque on Deposit only)
Drop-down
ГўВЂВ“ Default is All
ГўВЂВ“ Select specific code from list to search on that code only
